summary: Syringa villosa, the villous lilac or late lilac is a shrub native to Korea, the southern part of the Russian Far East ( Primorye ) and northern China. There are two subspecies currently recognized (April 2014); these are regarded as separate species in Flora of China. Combining the ranges for the two taxa yields a range within China of Hebei, Shanxi, Heilongjiang, Jilin, and Liaoning.
